decisions.decision: Employee profiles come from Azure SQL warehouse, not Graph
decisions.rationale: Keystone DW is canonical source; Graph used for auth/enrichment only

decisions.decision: Add ODBC to Who-Dis image rather than external sync
decisions.rationale: Simplest path — matches Crystal Ball pattern, enables background refresh

decisions.decision: Wrap async gather in app_context rather than per-task push
decisions.rationale: Cleaner — one context covers all 415 tasks

next_action: Deploy to SandCastle, verify employee profile sync runs (415 records), then /gsd:discuss-phase 7 for Compliance Polish
context_notes: Production bug-fix session. App is live at whodis.sandcastle.ttcu.com. Phases 1-6 verified complete. Next planned work is Phase 7 (Compliance Polish). Three operational items remain: deploy new image, fix Genesys DNS, verify profile sync.
